task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenClinica login screen with credentials entered (root) or the main OpenClinica dashboard indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Select the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'DM-TRIAL-2024' or 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' selected in the active study dropdown or displayed as the current study context in the OpenClinica interface.
Look for the 'Create Dataset' or 'Dataset Details' screen with 'Safety_PK_Analysis' entered in the Name field.

task_completion.description: Include required Demographics and Vital Signs items
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the dataset item selection screen or summary showing 'Date of Birth' (or DOB) and 'Gender' from the Demographics CRF, and 'Systolic BP', 'Diastolic BP', and 'Heart Rate' from the Vital Signs CRF checked or added to the dataset.

task_completion.description: Ensure no items from Adverse Events or Concomitant Medications are included
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dataset item selection or summary screen. Verify that no checkboxes are selected for items under the 'Adverse Events' or 'Concomitant Medications' CRFs.

task_completion.description: Export the dataset in Tab-Delimited Text format
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the dataset export screen showing 'Tab-Delimited Text' selected as the export format, or the generation of a file with a .tsv or .txt extension indicating tab-delimited format.
Look for a browser download dialog, a file manager window, or a terminal listing showing the exported dataset file successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Downloads' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to create the dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the OpenClinica web GUI in a browser, rather than just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The exported file was generated by OpenClinica
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking the actual download/export link within OpenClinica, rather than manually creating a text file or copying data into a spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually forge the dataset file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of the agent opening a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type out the dataset contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. Dataset Name: Safety_PK_Analysis. Required Items: DOB, Gender, Systolic, Diastolic, Heart. Forbidden Items: AE, Adverse, Toxicity, Concomitant, Medication. Export Format: Tab-Delimited Text.
